name: Tier II Report Validation and Submission File Export
description: The annual EPCRA Section 312 Tier II report for the 'Gulf Coast Petroleum Refinery' is almost complete, but it is missing required emergency contacts and the certification block. Using EPA Tier2 Submit 2025, import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\jefferson_refinery_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the facility record and add two emergency contacts: 1. Maria Elena Vásquez (Title: EHS Manager, Phone: 409-983-2200, 24-Hour: 409-983-2201). 2. David K. Thornton (Title: Plant Operations Supervisor, Phone: 409-983-2210, 24-Hour: 409-983-2211). Then, navigate to the Certification section and sign the report as Certifier: Robert M. Chen (Title: Senior Environmental Engineer, Date Signed: 02/15/2025). Once the data is entered, run the application's Validation check and ensure 0 errors remain. Finally, export/create the electronic submission file (.t2s) and save it exactly to: C:\TierIIReports\jefferson_refinery_2024.t2s
